Q3 Planning Meeting - Tuesday afternoon

Present: Clara, Marcus, Priya, Devon

We need to finalize the roadmap for Q3. Main topics were the new search feature, infrastructure work, and hiring.

Search feature:
- Clara demoed the prototype, looked good overall
- Needs performance improvements before launch
- Marcus will handle the indexing optimization
- Target: ready for internal testing by end of month

Infrastructure:
- Devon flagged that the build pipeline is taking too long (averaging 18 minutes)
- Agreed to investigate caching options
- Priya to look into distributed build options next week

Hiring:
- Two backend positions still open
- Devon to send job descriptions to recruiting by Wednesday
- Interview panel needs to be confirmed for the backend roles

Decisions:
- Search feature launch pushed to next quarter if performance targets not met
- All infrastructure changes need staging validation before production

Next steps summary:
- Marcus: indexing optimization
- Devon: job descriptions to recruiting, build pipeline investigation
- Priya: research distributed build options
- Clara: coordinate performance testing plan
